global.description: The ad features a vibrant design promoting the game VoxelRealm with gameplay elements and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to install the game and play with friends.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: VoxelRealm logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the text 'VoxelRealm' in bold, prominent font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Gameplay screenshot
elements.description: A visual representation of the gameplay, showing a grid of interactive elements with a light background.

elements.label: Gameplay screenshot
elements.description: Another view of the gameplay, similar to the previous element, showcasing different interactive elements.

elements.label: Interactive icon
elements.description: A small circular icon that appears to represent an interactive element in the game.

elements.label: Interactive icon
elements.description: A small circular icon, similar to the previous one, indicating another interactive feature.

elements.label: Interactive icon
elements.description: A small circular icon positioned at the top right, representing an additional interactive element.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element positioned in the center, possibly enhancing the visual appeal.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: Another small decorative element, similar to the previous one, adding to the overall design.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element at the top, contributing to the ad's visual style.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: Another small decorative element at the top, enhancing the overall design.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline text 'VoxelRealm' is bold and large, capturing attention at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: The body text reads 'Unlock rare gear Play with friends tonight' in a clear, readable font.
elements.text_content: Unlock rare gear Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The call to action text 'Install now' is prominently displayed at the bottom, encouraging user engagement.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and playful, VoxelRealm logo, gameplay screenshots, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, gameplay elements are centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: VoxelRealm, Unlock rare gear Play with friends tonight, Install now
